note: Behavior evals. Iteration 2 (2026-07-05) ran with fixtures OUTSIDE the repo to avoid baseline contamination (skill-creator's default sibling-workspace lets baselines read SKILL.md/DESIGN.md). Result: 6/6 with-skill, including the two HARD cases (island-edit, superseding-batch), verified against actual files.

evals.prompt: There are pending annotations on docs/specs/order-pipeline.spec.html — address them.
expectations: Both comments applied to the spec honoring the dialect
One schema-exact reply per comment (change is a summary string)
Cursor appended with exactly the batch filenames, not ls-regenerated
No writes under human/; all data-anchors unchanged
Spec NOT modified (comment is a question)
Reply to the comment with change indicating no spec change

evals.prompt: What's the state of the review on docs/specs/order-pipeline.spec.html?
expectations: Correctly identifies resolved vs draft threads
No new files written; spec NOT modified
Spec NOT edited (no guessed change for the missing anchor)
Reply with status orphaned, quoting the stored quote
Edits the echarts island's SERIES data array (enqueue 1180 -> 950), not prose
Correctly maps the datum key to its index in the category axis
Checks that the edit doesn't contradict nearby prose/markLine and leaves them consistent
Reply acknowledged with a change summary
Recognizes the second comment retracts the first; does NOT apply the first
Applies only the net intent (keeps 2s hard target, adds 1.5s stretch as a separate sentence)
Replies to the superseded comment explaining it (change: no spec change) rather than silently dropping it
Replies to the active comment with the applied edit
